title: geranium pyrenaicum subsp. depilatum
intro: Geranium pyrenaicum subsp. depilatum, also known as the Pyrenean geranium, is a perennial plant species within the geranium genus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing menstrual cramps and promoting wound healing, due to its bioactive compounds like flavonoids and terpenoids. The herbal preparations of this plant include tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to leverage its medicinal properties.
